name: Engulfing Flames

abilities.name: Spreading Flames
abilities.text: When an enemy model within 12" suffers damage from a Burning token that was not on itself, this model may have the damaged enemy gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Fire's Glow
actions.effects: Make an Inferno marker within range. Allies within (y)1" of the made marker may gain a Shielded token.

actions.name: Burn It. Burn It All.
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a climbable terrain piece of Ht 2 or more.
actions.effects: All models on top of the terrain piece are dealt 1 damage and gain a Burning token. Then they must move directly toward the edge of the target closest to them until they fall.

tokens.name: Burning
tokens.text: Referenced multiple times in abilities and actions

extraction_notes: Inferno marker rules not fully detailed on this card
Burning and Shielded token rules not fully detailed on this card
(y) symbol used for pulse range around marker
